# alscourse.com
> GooCampus ALS Course — India's only ERC-accredited Advanced Life Support
> training, recognised in the UK and Australia.

## Course
- Title: ERC-Accredited ALS Course India
- URL: https://alscourse.com/
- Description: 2-day hands-on Advanced Life Support course accredited by the European Resuscitation Council (ERC). Recognised by UK NHS and Australian healthcare employers. Valid for 3 years. Price: GBP 650. Location: Bangalore.
- Instructors: Martin Pearce (ERC Faculty), Matthew Donnelly (Course Director)
- Target audience: International Medical Graduates (IMGs), doctors preparing for PLAB, NHS roles, AMC pathway, or emergency medicine positions.

## Organisation
- Name: GooCampus
- Website: https://goocampusglobal.com
- Contact: neha@goocampus.in
- Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
